activitywatch._comment: The captain's own AW MCP build (free, local). Gives every Claude Code session in this repo direct time-audit sight — the /organism-doctor and /matchday skills use it when present. Deterministic organs (timeaudit/touchline) still read AW REST directly; this is the interactive-session lane only.

organism-memory._comment: working-memory P2. The door into the ONE working memory — recall(query) over his durable episodes+words, note(kind,text) routed through the thalamus (:4113), get_context() rehydrate, remember_fact(text) STAGED to pending (Law 4, never canon). Dependency-free stdio JSON-RPC. Register the SAME server in Claude Desktop's config to give the Desktop study room the same recall+capture.
